workingProcess.title: Working Process
workingProcess.subtitle: How does Asklyze work?
workingProcess.step1Desc: Define your safe scope. Select schemas and tables to expose to AI (supporting 1000+ tables).
workingProcess.step2Desc: Automatic relationship analysis. The engine identifies Foreign Keys and optimizes joins automatically.
workingProcess.step3Desc: Generate intelligent descriptions. Give the AI business context beyond just technical table names.

featureGrid.title: Why Choose ASKLYZE
featureGrid.desc: Transform Oracle APEX into an AI-powered analytics center with our simple 3-step setup process and enterprise-grade features.

features.title: Natural Language to SQL
features.desc: Bridge the technical gap. Move from manual SQL coding to natural language questions for instant insights.

features.title: Zero Data Movement
features.desc: Logic executes locally via our native Plugin. Your sensitive data never leaves your Oracle environment.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.desc: Integrated with Oracle VPD and Row-Level Security. Compliance is built-in, not an afterthought.

features.title: Flexible Deployment
features.desc: Choose On-Premise for sovereignty or SaaS via ORDS for scalability. Supports Oracle 19c & 23ai.

features.title: Smart Visualization
features.desc: 22+ chart types with ECharts. Combo charts, multi-series support, and AI-generated narratives.

features.title: Intent Detection
features.desc: Advanced NLP tags queries as REPORT, ANALYTICS, or TRENDING to deliver the perfect response format.

section1.title: Native APEX Integration.
section1.desc: Built as a native Plugin that executes queries locally. We bridge the gap between complex database structures and executive decision-making without moving a single byte of data.

section2.title: Audit & Compliance.
section2.desc: Every query is logged in the ASKLYZE_AI_QUERY_STORE. Use these logs for performance monitoring, compliance auditing, and refining AI responses over time.

faq.title: Want to ask something from us?

list.question: How is ASKLYZE deployed?
list.answer: We offer two models: 'On-Premise' for complete data sovereignty (ideal for government/banking) and 'SaaS' via ORDS for rapid deployment in multi-tenant environments.

list.question: Is it compatible with my Oracle version?
list.answer: Yes, ASKLYZE is fully compatible with Oracle 19c and ready for the advanced capabilities of Oracle 23ai, ensuring long-term infrastructure sustainability.

list.question: Does my data leave the server?
list.answer: Absolutely not. Our 'Zero Data Movement' architecture ensures that the AI acts only as a logic layer. Usage data is processed, but your core business data remains 100% within your local Oracle environment.

list.question: Can it handle complex pricing/queries?
list.answer: Yes. The 'Intent Detection' engine categorizes queries (Report, Analytics, Trending) and supports advanced logic like Year-over-Year growth and complex join conditions.
